channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania requires one-year internship for new teachers before licensing
item.description: Tanzania is implementing a significant reform in teacher training by mandating a one-year supervised internship for newly qualified teachers before granting them professional licenses. This change, pa...

item.title: James Carville Condemns Trump's Anti-Democrat Smear Tactics
item.description: Democratic strategist James Carville harshly criticized President Donald Trump for his recent smear campaign labeling Democrats as communists, a tactic he claims reflects Trump's profound ignorance of...

item.title: Wike's daughter secures law degree from Southampton University
item.description: Jazmyne Wike, daughter of Federal Capital Territory Minister Nyesom Wike, has successfully graduated with a Bachelor of Laws (LL.B. Hons) degree from the University of Southampton in the UK. She achie...

item.title: Wildfire near Boston Bar, B.C., quadruples in size; evacuation orders remain in effect
item.description: A new wildfire near Boston Bar, B.C., has more than quadrupled in size overnight, prompting ongoing evacuation orders for residents in the area. The Anderson Creek fire, which started beside Highway 1...

item.title: Nighttime Rescue Operations Save Hikers in Cape Town's Nature Reserves
item.description: A series of critical wilderness rescues unfolded across Cape Town's Helderberg Nature Reserve and Table Mountain on Tuesday night, highlighting the dangers of hiking in remote areas. An unconscious hi...

item.title: Cracker Barrel Closes Maple Street Biscuit Company Locations in Strategic Restructuring
item.description: Cracker Barrel, the iconic US dining chain, has announced the closure of all 35 locations of its sister brand, Maple Street Biscuit Company. The decision follows a broader corporate strategy to stream...

item.title: Federal Judge Criticizes Supreme Court's Chevron Deference Ruling as Misguided
item.description: A Republican-appointed federal judge has raised concerns about a significant error in the Supreme Court's landmark Loper Bright decision, which ended Chevron deference—a legal principle that allowed f...

item.title: Labor Faces Pressure to Address Gambling Donations and Advertising Reforms
item.description: The article discusses growing concerns within the Australian Labor Party (ALP) regarding its handling of donations from gambling interests and potential reforms to gambling advertising regulations. At...

item.title: DFA Condemns China's Actions in South China Sea Dispute
item.description: Foreign Affairs Secretary Ma. Theresa Lazaro raised three key concerns during a bilateral meeting with Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi, focusing on recent tensions in the South China Sea. The Philipp...

item.title: Manipur Police and NCB arrest major drug supplier linked to Myanmar syndicate in NDPS cases
item.description: A joint team of Manipur Police and the Narcotics Control Bureau (NCB) arrested Nengjatuan alias Tuanpi, a major drug supplier wanted in multiple Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances (NDPS) cases...

item.title: Free State Judge on Sick Leave for Eight Years Faces Tribunal Probe
item.description: Free State Judge Lepona Joshua Lekale has been on sick leave for eight years, earning a judge's salary and benefits without performing any duties. A Judicial Conduct Tribunal is investigating his medi...

item.title: ASX poised for rise as US markets waver ahead of key earnings reports
item.description: Australian shares are expected to climb as ASX 200 futures point higher, while US stocks show mixed performance with Alphabet and Tesla's earnings reports pending. Oil prices continue to rise amid geo...

item.title: Toronto Man Charged with Terrorism After Anti-Israel Protests Linked to Hamas
item.description: A 33-year-old Toronto man, Ahmad Hassan Hajahmad, has been charged with terrorism following his alleged involvement in anti-Israel protests in downtown Toronto. Police allege he used amplification dev...

item.title: The Role of Critical Thinking in the AI Era
item.description: The article explores how artificial intelligence is transforming knowledge access, making information more available but emphasizing that mere information is no longer sufficient. It highlights the sh...

item.title: Four Honduran Nationals Drown in Ohio River During Rescue Attempt
item.description: Four individuals, identified as two married couples from Honduras, tragically drowned in the Scioto River in Ohio on Sunday while attempting to rescue a struggling swimmer. The victims—Miguel Ángel Gu...

item.title: West Virginia Delegate Accused of Exploiting Teen Through Roblox
item.description: David Elliott Pritt, a high school teacher and assistant house majority leader in West Virginia's state House of Delegates, faces charges of enticing a minor through the gaming platform Roblox. Accord...

item.title: Supreme Court Rejects Urgent Hearing on Police Action During Protests
item.description: The Supreme Court of India, led by Chief Justice Surya Kant, declined to urgently hear a petition alleging police brutality during a protest against the National Testing Agency (NTA) reforms. The peti...

item.title: Content creator honored for boosting Tanzania's creative economy
item.description: Digital content creator Abdul Hussein Chacha, known as Headmaster, has been awarded Sh5 million, an NSSF membership card, and a QR code enabling global sales of his work. The recognition was presented...

item.title: Witness Accounts Detail ICE Officer's Actions Following Fatal Shooting of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo
item.description: A federal agent who shot and killed Houston man Lorenzo Salgado Araujo during an immigration enforcement encounter switched guns with another officer after firing, according to a witness account filed...

item.title: Paquito advises Django to take missions seriously in Sigabo episode 23
item.description: The news article discusses the latest episode of the Philippine TV series 'Sigabo,' where character Paquito gives advice to Django about approaching his missions with seriousness. The episode, titled ...
